mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages m JOIN conversations c ON m.conversation_id = c.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND m.role = 'USER' AND m.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sentence_corrections WHERE user_id = #{userId}

WITH activity_days AS ( SELECT DISTINCT DATE(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS day FROM sentence_corrections WHERE user_id = #{userId} UNION SELECT DISTINCT DATE(m.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS day FROM messages m JOIN conversations c ON m.conversation_id = c.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND m.role = 'USER' UNION SELECT DISTINCT entry_date AS day FROM diary_entries WHERE user_id = #{userId} ), numbered AS ( SELECT day, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY day DESC) AS rn FROM activity_days WHERE day <= CURRENT_DATE ), grouped AS ( SELECT day, rn, (day - CAST(rn AS INTEGER)) AS grp FROM numbered ) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grouped WHERE grp = (SELECT grp FROM grouped ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 1)

WITH days AS ( SELECT generate_series( CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 days', CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1 day' )::date AS day ), corrections AS ( SELECT DATE(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sentence_corrections WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 days' GROUP BY 1 ), messages AS ( SELECT DATE(m.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM messages m JOIN conversations c ON m.conversation_id = c.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND m.role = 'USER' AND m.created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 days' GROUP BY 1 ), diary AS ( SELECT entry_date AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM diary_entries WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND entry_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 days' GROUP BY 1 ) SELECT TO_CHAR(d.day, 'Dy') AS day, COALESCE(m.cnt, 0) + COALESCE(cor.cnt, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(di.cnt, 0) * 5 AS minutes, CASE WHEN COALESCE(m.cnt, 0) + COALESCE(cor.cnt, 0) > 0 THEN LEAST(100, 70 + COALESCE(cor.cnt, 0) * 5) ELSE 0 END AS accuracy FROM days d LEFT JOIN messages m ON m.day = d.day LEFT JOIN corrections cor ON cor.day = d.day LEFT JOIN diary di ON di.day = d.day ORDER BY d.day ASC
